action_set_definitions.name: get_student_current_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current proficiency metrics, engagement level, and completed modules for the student to initialize the session context.

action_set_definitions.name: get_recent_session_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the log of the last N actions and student scores to identify trends in fatigue, momentum, or wheel-spinning.

limit.description: Number of recent logs to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_learning_interaction
action_set_definitions.description: Delivers an instructional task at a specific scaffold level and observes the resulting student performance and engagement.

scaffold_level.description: Scaffold level to apply: 3 (heavy guidance), 2 (moderate), 1 (light prompts), 0 (autonomous).

module_id.description: The ID of the curriculum module (e.g., 'photosynthesis_light_intensity').

action_set_definitions.name: log_session_conclusion
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the session by recording the final outcome (e.g., Mastery Achieved, Session Suspended).

status.description: The final state of the learning session.

reason.description: Detailed explanation for why the session was concluded or suspended.

state_description.student_proficiency: A mapping of curriculum topics to a float (0.0 to 1.0) representing the student's current mastery level.
state_description.completed_modules: A list of unique identifiers for lessons or modules the student has already finished.
state_description.engagement_level: A value between 0.0 and 1.0 representing the student's current motivation and focus; affects the probability of learning success.
state_description.session_history: A log of the last 5 actions and student scores used to model short-term trends like fatigue or momentum.
